creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 217502
Patch to upgrade sysutils/rubygem-fluentd to 1.11.2 and fix minor warnings in sample config

This patch will update sysutils/rubygem-fluentd to the latest version 1.11.2

Also it will install new sample configuration file generated with fluentd 1.11.2

Changelog:
https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
